case_title: JULIANA VALERIE MCCARTHY VS. MARK ANDREW BRUBAKER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2010 - CONTINUED PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-26-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT - DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE - DEFENDANT DID NOT SIGN FOR CERTIFIED MAIL. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, JULIANA VALERIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRUBAKER, MARK ANDREW THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES DID NOT EXCEED DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, PLUS INTEREST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, JULIANA VALERIE AS TO DEFENDANT BRUBAKER, MARK ANDREW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.50) SERVED MAR-31-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRUBAKER, MARK ANDREW
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, JULIANA VALERIE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,680.00 FILED BY MCCARTHY, JULIANA VALERIE AS TO DEFENDANT BRUBAKER, MARK ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-01-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRUBAKER, MARK ANDREW
